parameters.query:
={{ (function() {
  var d = $json;
  return "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS avis ("
    + "id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), "
    + "tenant_id UUID NOT NULL, lead_id UUID, nom VARCHAR(100), prenom VARCHAR(100), "
    + "entreprise VARCHAR(200), email VARCHAR(200), telephone VARCHAR(20), "
    + "note INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK (note >= 0 AND note <= 5), "
    + "commentaire TEXT, channel VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'web', "
    + "token VARCHAR(100), affiche BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, "
    + "created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()"
    + "); "
    + "INSERT INTO avis (tenant_id, lead_id, nom, prenom, entreprise, email, channel, token, note, commentaire) VALUES ("
    + "'" + d.tenantId + "', "
    + (d.leadId ? "'" + d.leadId + "'" : "NULL") + ", "
    + "'" + (d.nom || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "', "
    + "'" + (d.prenom || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "', "
    + "'" + (d.entreprise || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "', "
    + "'" + (d.email || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "', "
    + "'email', "
    + "'" + d.token + "', "
    + "0, '') ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING";
})() }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, token: $('02. Build Email').first().json.token, email: $('02. Build Email').first().json.email, avisUrl: $('02. Build Email').first().json.avisUrl } }}
